summary: Share of renter buildings that are 20-49 units in Bay Area with EPC classification, pre-org status, and building count.

Bay Area transit model network stops with line name, is-stop flag, station name, and sequence.

LIHTC qualifying parcels for Bay Area with PDA type, transit proximity tiers, use codes, and ENVIROSTOR data.

Bay Area parcel development scenario data with zoning envelopes, FAR, building type, and floor count.
Bay Area ZIP code data on number of 2-4 unit properties sold with sale price per unit.
